{ "name" : "concat-map", "description" : "concatenative mapdashery", "version" : "0.0.1", "repository" : { "type" : "git", "url" : "git://github.com/substack/node-concat-map.git" }, "main" : "index.js", "keywords" : [ "concat", "concatMap", "map", "functional", "higher-order" ], "directories" : { "example" : "example", "test" : "test" }, "scripts" : { "test" : "tape test/*.js" }, "devDependencies" : { "tape" : "~2.4.0" }, "license" : "MIT", "author" : { "name" : "James Halliday", "email" : "mail@substack.net", "url" : "http://substack.net" }, "testling" : { "files" : "test/*.js", "browsers" : { "ie" : [ 6, 7, 8, 9 ], "ff" : [ 3.5, 10, 15.0 ], "chrome" : [ 10, 22 ], "safari" : [ 5.1 ], "opera" : [ 12 ] } } }
